seoTitle: Charmhaven vs Chatham Valley — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Charmhaven and Chatham Valley. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Charmhaven vs Chatham Valley: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Charmhaven and Chatham Valley.
heading: Charmhaven vs Chatham Valley — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Charmhaven, New South Wales and Chatham Valley, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Chatham Valley has a lower overall climate risk score (42/100) compared to Charmhaven (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Charmhaven or Chatham Valley safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Charmhaven has a flood risk score of 39/100, while Chatham Valley scores 54/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Charmhaven scores 50/100 for bushfire risk. Chatham Valley scores 56/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Charmhaven or Chatham Valley?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Chatham Valley has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.95% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
